market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Nvidia’s $20 billion debt boom reinforces Bitcoin miners' AI pivot
articles.description: Nvidia’s planned bond sale reinforces booming AI infrastructure demand, strengthening the case for Bitcoin miners pivoting toward AI data centers.

articles.title: CFTC hires SEC crypto task force adviser with blockchain forensics chops
articles.description: The CFTC staff appointment came amid the US Congress seeking to overhaul federal financial regulators’ roles over digital assets with the CLARITY Act.

articles.title: BitMine boosts ETH holdings closer to $10B as bear market accumulation continues
articles.description: BitMine continued buying Ether through the market downturn, growing its stake to nearly 5% of the circulating supply while generating staking yield amid mounting ecosystem challenges.

articles.title: Kraken rolls out perpetual futures for US traders through CFTC-regulated venue
articles.description: The offering follows Kraken's acquisition of Bitnomial and comes amid a broader push to bring crypto derivatives trading onshore.

articles.title: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
articles.description: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.

articles.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
articles.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

articles.title: Hyperliquid loses Anthropic, OpenAI markets as creator shuts down project
articles.description: Ventuals, one of the teams behind real-world asset perpetuals on Hyperliquid, said it is closing its markets and joining another project in the ecosystem.

articles.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
articles.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

articles.title: These Bitcoin charts show how BTC price could hit $100K before October
articles.description: Bitcoin’s double-bottom setup, weekly RSI divergence and whale flows put traders on alert as BTC tests a key breakout zone.

articles.title: Bitcoin analysis warns over BTC price rejection as $67K approaches
articles.description: Bitcoin snatched upside liquidity as the US trading session began, but traders warned over a failure to preserve BTC price gains.

articles.title: Pudgy Penguins winds down Pudgy Party mobile game
articles.description: Pudgy Penguins will halt development of Pudgy Party and focus on Pudgy World, as another Web3 gaming project shuts down after failing to find a sustainable business model.

articles.title: SpaceX’s biggest-ever IPO just grew to $85.7 billion raised
articles.description: SpaceX's IPO underwriters maxed out their share purchases, adding to an already historic amount of money raised.

articles.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6B
articles.description: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.

articles.title: If America wants to lead in crypto, it must protect the people who build it
articles.description: Despite the Clarity Act’s advancement toward the finish line, there’s one provision under threat for builders that can’t be overlooked, argues Smith.

articles.title: ‘Crypto spring’ is here, says one analyst after bitcoin's key signals turn bullish
articles.description: Standard Chartered analyst Geoffrey Kendrick's bullish call comes as spot bitcoin exchange-traded fund inflows return, oil prices fall and Coinbase's CEO says bitcoin likely bottomed near $60,000.

articles.title: 台灣新思科技迎接成立 35 周年，與工研院簽訂合作協議發展 IC 設計產業
articles.description: 台灣新思科技（Synopsys Taiwan）在迎接成立35周年之際，除了舉辦竹科X軟體園區新辦公室啟用典禮之 […]

articles.title: Kraken debuts U.S. perpetual futures as crypto derivatives move onshore
articles.description: Perpetual futures generated more than $60 trillion in volume last year, according to the crypto exchange, largely outside the U.S.

articles.title: 韋伯望遠鏡破譯早期宇宙「小紅點」之謎，揪出被氣體包覆的超大質量黑洞
articles.description: 2022 年 NASA 詹姆斯·韋伯太空望遠鏡（JWST）發現神祕的「小紅點」（little red dots […]

articles.title: Saylor’s Strategy buys 1,587 BTC for $100M, holdings hit 846.8K
articles.description: Strategy acquired 1,587 Bitcoin for $100 million last week, lifting holdings to 846,842 BTC after raising $209 million through MSTR stock sales.

articles.title: Sarvam becomes India’s newest AI unicorn with $234 million funding round led by HCLTech
articles.description: Indian IT services company HCLTech is investing $150 million in the Bengaluru startup.
